# cpp-httplib

- **Version:** v0.15.3
- **Source:** https://github.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib/releases/tag/v0.15.3
- **URL:** https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib/v0.15.3/httplib.h

A C++11 single-file header-only cross platform HTTP/HTTPS library. 
Used in `shield-str` project to provide an example of dynamic rule injection API.
